creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you, Lorenzo!

One pragmatic idea: How about only packaging this with the default 
version of GCC (aka GCC_DEFAULT), at least for now?

That avoids the conflict and, frankly, anyone who is using something
different is going to run into "funny" moments sooner or later anyway.

(And, more than frankly, simply ignore powerpcspe which has GCC_DEFAULT
set to 8 since GCC removed that port afterwards for lack of future and
use.
